Appointment to Client Conversion: For agencies specializing in luxury PPC services, the conversion rate from booked appointments to closed clients can also be influenced by the thoroughness of the qualification process and the effectiveness of sales follow-ups. While specific data on luxury PPC conversion is sparse, agencies typically aim for a 10-20% conversion rate from appointments to closed deals in high-end markets. This reflects the need for personalized engagement and detailed client education during the sales process.

Marketing agencies typically experience a client turnover rate of around 30% annually, which translates to roughly 2.5% per month. This turnover rate can vary depending on whether the agency is project-based or retainer-based. Project-based agencies might see a higher annual turnover rate of 30-50%, while retainer-based agencies usually aim to keep their annual turnover below 20% to ensure stability and client satisfaction【6†source】【7†source】【8†source】.
